/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-omit-frame-pointer -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.0.0 -current_version 1.6.2 -o libADLMIDI.1.6.2.dylib -install_name @rpath/libADLMIDI.1.dylib CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_shared.dir/src/adlmidi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_shared.dir/src/adlmidi_load.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_shared.dir/src/adlmidi_midiplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_shared.dir/src/models/model_ail.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_shared.dir/src/models/model_apogee.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_shared.dir/src/models/model_dmx.c.o
